Skip to contents
debiasLLMReporting 0.0.1
  • Getting Started
  • Continuous Outcomes
  • Real Data Example
  • Reference

    Function reference

    Core Estimators

    Main functions for debiased prevalence estimation

    ppi_point_and_ci()
    Prediction-powered mean estimator with logit CI.
    ppi_pp_point_and_ci()
    PPI++ estimator with optimal unconstrained lambda.
    rg_point_and_ci()
    Rogan-Gladen corrected estimator with finite-sample adjustment.
    eif_point_and_ci()
    EIF (Efficient Influence Function) estimator for binary surrogates.
    mle_point_and_ci()
    MLE estimator with consistent output format.
    fit_misclass_mle()
    Joint MLE under the binary misclassification model.
    grab_theta()
    Grab the theta-specific summary from a joint MLE fit.

    Discrete Estimators

    Estimators for discrete outcomes

    eif_discrete_point_and_ci()
    EIF estimator with per-category calibration (optimal for discrete)
    eif_gam_discrete_point_and_ci()
    EIF estimator with GAM calibration
    eif_linear_discrete_point_and_ci()
    EIF estimator with linear calibration (suboptimal for discrete)
    eif_spline_discrete_point_and_ci()
    EIF estimator with spline calibration
    naive_discrete_point_and_ci()
    Naive estimator: just use mean of discrete predictions
    oracle_discrete_point_and_ci()
    Oracle estimator (knows true \(\mu\) values)
    ppi_discrete_point_and_ci()
    PPI estimator for discrete predictions
    ppi_pp_discrete_point_and_ci()
    PPI++ estimator for discrete predictions

    Continuous Estimators

    Estimators for continuous outcomes

    eif_continuous_point_and_ci()
    EIF estimator for continuous surrogates with calibration
    naive_continuous_point_and_ci()
    Naive estimator (just use model predictions)
    ppi_continuous_point_and_ci()
    PPI estimator for continuous scores
    ppi_pp_continuous_point_and_ci()
    PPI++ estimator for continuous scores

    Calibration Functions

    Functions for fitting calibration models

    fit_calibration_gam()
    Fit calibration model using GAM
    fit_calibration_isotonic()
    Fit calibration model using isotonic regression
    fit_calibration_linear()
    Fit calibration model using linear regression
    fit_calibration_spline()
    Fit calibration model using cubic spline

    Data Generation

    Functions for generating simulated data

    generate_discrete_dgp()
    Generate discrete prediction data

    Helper Functions

    Utility functions

    logit_ci()
    Wald-style confidence interval via logit transform.

    Visualization

    Plotting functions for simulation results

    plot_coverage()
    Plot empirical coverage across simulation settings
    plot_ci_width()
    Plot mean confidence interval width across simulation settings
    plot_bias()
    Plot estimator bias across simulation settings
    plot_bias_pct()
    Plot percent bias across simulation settings
    plot_q_bias()
    Plot calibration bias for \(\hat q_0\) and \(\hat q_1\)
    build_line_plot()
    Generic line plot builder
    generate_plot_suite()
    Generate all 5 standard plots for a given data subset
    get_method_color_scale()
    Get the fixed color scale for methods
    plot_base_theme()
    Base theme for standard plots
    plot_base_theme_aggregate()
    Larger legend theme for aggregate plots (stacked in two rows)
    format_label_ratio()
    Format a labeling ratio as a percentage string

    On this page

    Developed by Yiqun Chen, Moran Guo.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
